name: Supervisor Watchdog Build and Certify

steps.action: pip install requests  (skip if already installed)

steps.expected: JSON output with all_ok:true and all services OK

steps.action: Kill supervisor process via Task Manager or: taskkill /F /FI "WINDOWTITLE eq supervisor*"
steps.expected: supervisor listed as DOWN in next check
supervisor restarted + Telegram alert received on @Brianbrainboxbot

cert_criteria: watchdog.py --check exits 0 with all services OK
Killing supervisor.py → watchdog restarts it → Telegram alert received
Task Scheduler entry 'APEX-Watchdog' exists and fires every 5 min
